This account bears the admin role (for the granted role). Expected in cases where the role was granted using the internal {AccessControl-_grantRole}."},"RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)"},"Transfer(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Emitted when `tokenId` token is transferred from `from` to `to`."},"Unpaused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`."}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"approve(address,uint256)":{"details":"Gives permission to `to` to transfer `tokenId` token to another account. The approval is cleared when the token is transferred. Only a single account can be approved at a time, so approving the zero address clears previous approvals. Requirements: - The caller must own the token or be an approved operator. - `tokenId` must exist. Emits an {Approval} event."},"balanceOf(address)":{"details":"Returns the number of tokens in ``owner``'s account."},"constructor":{"params":{"_passportContract":"Adresse du contrat RimowaPassport","initialAdmin":"Adresse admin (multisig RIMOWA)"}},"getApproved(uint256)":{"details":"Returns the account approved for `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist."},"getRepairHistory(uint256)":{"details":"Retourne une copie du tableau \u2014 born\u00e9 par repairCount (pas de boucle infinie)."},"getRoleAdmin(bytes32)":{"details":"Returns the admin role that controls `role`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. Appel\u00e9 automatiquement apr\u00e8s le transfert du passeport ERC-721.","params":{"ipfsCid":"CID des m\u00e9tadonn\u00e9es du nouveau soulbound","newOwner":"Adresse du nouvel acheteur","passportTokenId":"ID du passeport transf\u00e9r\u00e9"}},"mintSoulbound(address,uint256,string,uint8)":{"details":"Appel\u00e9 lors du premier achat en boutique ou lors d'une revente.      Si un soulbound existe d\u00e9j\u00e0 pour ce passeport, il est br\u00fbl\u00e9 d'abord.","params":{"ipfsCid":"CID IPFS des m\u00e9tadonn\u00e9es du soulbound","passportTokenId":"ID du passeport ERC-721 associ\u00e9","tier":"Statut de fid\u00e9lit\u00e9 initial","to":"Adresse Smart Account du nouveau propri\u00e9taire"}},"name()":{"details":"Returns the token collection name."},"ownerOf(uint256)":{"details":"Returns the owner of the `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist."},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"recordRepair(uint256,string,string)":{"details":"Seul un SAV_OPERATOR_ROLE peut enregistrer une r\u00e9paration.      Le rapport est stock\u00e9 sur IPFS, seul le CID est on-chain.","params":{"description":"Description courte de la r\u00e9paration","soulboundId":"ID du soulbound token","workshopCid":"CID IPFS du rapport de r\u00e9paration"}},"renounceRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`, checking first that contract recipients are aware of the ERC-721 protocol to prevent tokens from being forever locked. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been allowed to move this token by either {approve} or   {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event."},"safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must be approved to move this token by either {approve} or {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event."},"setApprovalForAll(address,bool)":{"details":"Approve or remove `operator` as an operator for the caller. Operators can call {transferFrom} or {safeTransferFrom} for any token owned by the caller. Requirements: - The `operator` cannot be the address zero. Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event."},"symbol()":{"details":"Returns the token collection symbol."},"transferFrom(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`. WARNING: Note that the caller is responsible to confirm that the recipient is capable of receiving ERC-721 or else they may be permanently lost. Usage of {safeTransferFrom} prevents loss, though the caller must understand this adds an external call which potentially creates a reentrancy vulnerability. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must be approved to move this token by either {approve} or {setApprovalForAll}. Emits a {Transfer} event."},"upgradeTier(uint256,uint8)":{"details":"Appel\u00e9 par RIMOWA lors d'un deuxi\u00e8me achat ou qualification approve(address,uint256).details: Gives permission to `to` to transfer `tokenId` token to another account. The approval is cleared when the token is transferred. Only a single account can be approved at a time, so approving the zero address clears previous approvals. Requirements: - The caller must own the token or be an approved operator. - `tokenId` must exist. Emits an {Approval} event.

balanceOf(address).details: Returns the number of tokens in ``owner``'s account.

getApproved(uint256).details: Returns the account approved for `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist.

getRepairHistory(uint256).details: Retourne une copie du tableau — borné par repairCount (pas de boucle infinie).

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

isApprovedForAll(address,address).details: Returns if the `operator` is allowed to manage all of the assets of `owner`. See {setApprovalForAll}

migrateSoulbound(uint256,address,string).details: Brûle l'ancien soulbound, crée le nouveau pour le nouvel acheteur.      Appelé automatiquement après le transfert du passeport ERC-721.

params.ipfsCid: CID des métadonnées du nouveau soulbound

mintSoulbound(address,uint256,string,uin.details: Appelé lors du premier achat en boutique ou lors d'une revente.      Si un soulbound existe déjà pour ce passeport, il est brûlé d'abord.

params.ipfsCid: CID IPFS des métadonnées du soulbound
params.to: Adresse Smart Account du nouveau propriétaire

ownerOf(uint256).details: Returns the owner of the `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

recordRepair(uint256,string,string).details: Seul un SAV_OPERATOR_ROLE peut enregistrer une réparation.      Le rapport est stocké sur IPFS, seul le CID est on-chain.

params.workshopCid: CID IPFS du rapport de réparation

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256.details: Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`, checking first that contract recipients are aware of the ERC-721 protocol to prevent tokens from being forever locked. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been allowed to move this token by either {approve} or   {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event.

Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must be approved to move this token by either {approve} or {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event.

setApprovalForAll(address,bool).details: Approve or remove `operator` as an operator for the caller. Operators can call {transferFrom} or {safeTransferFrom} for any token owned by the caller. Requirements: - The `operator` cannot be the address zero. Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event.

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).details: Transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`. WARNING: Note that the caller is responsible to confirm that the recipient is capable of receiving ERC-721 or else they may be permanently lost. Usage of {safeTransferFrom} prevents loss, though the caller must understand this adds an external call which potentially creates a reentrancy vulnerability. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must be approved to move this token by either {approve} or {setApprovalForAll}. Emits a {Transfer} event.

upgradeTier(uint256,uint8).details: Appelé par RIMOWA lors d'un deuxième achat ou qualification spéciale.

getRepairHistory(uint256).notice: Retourne l'historique des réparations d'une valise.

getSoulboundByPassport(uint256).notice: Retourne le soulbound associé à un passeport.

getSoulboundData(uint256).notice: Retourne les données du soulbound d'un propriétaire de passeport.

hasLifetimeWarranty(uint256).notice: Vérifie si la garantie à vie est active pour un soulbound.

locked(uint256).notice: Implémentation ERC-5192 : tous les tokens sont locked.

migrateSoulbound(uint256,address,string).notice: Migre le soulbound lors d'une revente de valise.

mintSoulbound(address,uint256,string,uin.notice: Mint d'un Soulbound Token pour un nouveau propriétaire de valise.

passportContract().notice: Adresse du contrat RimowaPassport (pour validation croisée)

recordRepair(uint256,string,string).notice: Enregistre un passage en SAV officiel RIMOWA.

upgradeTier(uint256,uint8).notice: Met à jour le statut de fidélité d'un membre.
